title: Buy Now, Pay Later
scenario: At checkout for a ₹20,000 gadget, a 'Buy Now, Pay Later' option splits it into easy instalments with one tap. It feels painless. Do you use it?

choices.label: Tap 'Pay Later' — it's so easy
choices.lesson: BNPL is still debt, often at high effective interest. By removing the 'pain' of paying, it nudges you to buy things you'd otherwise skip.

choices.label: Pay in full or skip the buy
choices.lesson: If you can't comfortably pay in full, that's a signal you can't really afford it yet. The easiest debt to manage is the debt you never take.

concept: Buy Now Pay Later & frictionless debt
